theme: Scope creep negotiation plus Nova data migration failure mid-sprint

events.text: Client submitted 4 new feature requests mid-sprint — advanced reporting, multi-tenant SSO, custom webhook builder, and audit log export
ATL-501 opened — scope change request: 4 features added by client outside agreed sprint scope
Subject: Feature additions — urgent request | Body: Client VP requesting 4 features be included in current sprint delivery, citing competitive pressure
PM: these 4 features represent approximately 3 weeks of additional work — current sprint ends in 4 days
ATL-502 impact assessment opened — estimating effort for 4 new feature requests
Engineering lead: advanced reporting alone is 8 days, multi-tenant SSO is 6 days — cannot fit in current sprint
CRITICAL: data migration job failed at record 34,247 of 98,412 — FK constraint violation halting run
REVERT: migration-runner-v2.sql — FK constraint order incorrect, child records inserted before parent

NOVA-502 opened — rollback strategy for 34,247 orphaned records needed before migration can restart
Engineering: cannot do simple DELETE — orphaned records have triggered downstream writes in 3 tables
fix: correct FK constraint insertion order in migration-runner-v2.sql — parents before children
